subject: feat(icons): add SVG icon source and PNG generation pipeline
body:
Set up the icon generation system per Suggested Implementations. Single
SVG source (glowing document on navy background) generates all needed
PNG sizes via Sharp. Design follows maskable icon rules: square canvas,
full background, content in inner 80% safe zone, legible at 48px.

Generated sizes: 1024 (icon, adaptive, splash), 512, 192, 48 (favicon).

Tags: icons, assets, build
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: icon-system
Semver: minor

title: add SVG icon source and PNG generation pipeline
